assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Uses 'ALL_UPGRADES' scope for BFCM period but doesn't mention the 30-day maximum limitation or that this blocks patches

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Correctly uses 'ALL_UPGRADES' scope for the entire month of June

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion for ongoing minor upgrade control — allows CP patches but blocks disruptive changes
assertions.reason: Uses 'MINOR_UPGRADES' scope for year-round minor upgrade blocking

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for 'no upgrades' exclusions or the difference in duration limits between exclusion types

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the 48-hour maintenance window requirement

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Does not mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows and exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not warn about version drift risks during extended exclusion periods, only mentions monitoring for critical security updates
